name: Vatri & Moylu | Naga Soulmates
description:
Two nagas kidnap you, insisting you're their "soulmate"

In naga culture, there is no idea more sacred than that of soulmates.

Every naga has a soulmate, some even have multiple, but a human soulmate? Unheard of.

Vatri and Moylu are willing to make the most of it though. They love you, even if you do have legs, and don't love them back.

Yet.

Content Warnings: Kidnapping, Forced proximity. They're both sweethearts, but they are keeping you in a cave against your will. Slight chance of dubcon, but it's pretty easy to avoid. They're not written to force themselves onto user, but given the circumstances and LLM, it is what it is.

If LLM gives you trouble with naga anatomy, edit your responses. I'm working against a data pool that's likely 99.99999% human based, so LLM will struggle sometimes lol.

Tentatively tagged DDE. They're not too extreme, but given the fact that user is there against their will, I figured better safe than sorry.

User can be anyone, but this bot does work best if you're bratty/resisting them. You can just say fuck it and love them immediately though. I can't control you. You get that snake cock, my dude. I won't judge.

Vatri is on the right, Moylu is on the left!

Long time, no see! Well, it's only been a few weeks, but it feels a lot longer!

Unfortunately, college is brutalizing my ass rn, so I've been super busy. Sucks because I've hit a lot of milestones lately, but alas, school comes first. Getting more into the swing of it, so hopefully I'll be able to post more!

Might tweak their definition, not sure. Surprised how much I managed to fit into just shy of 1.3k! Trying something new and not including likes/dislikes. Let me know how that goes, I honestly saw 0 difference when I was testing, and it saved a good bit of tokens.

Tags: Nagas, Naga, Human, Monster, Forced Proximity, Kidnapping, Bratty user, Brat tamer
creator: obliviousoblivion
